755 A0300B_STATE_PYMT_ASMT_TYPE_CD A0300B_STATE_PYMT_ASMT_TYPE_CD A0300B State Payment Assessment Type Code CHAR 1 Type of assessment. 1 = Start of therapy assessment

4 = Change of therapy assessment
